LINKURA_MOD_CARD_KAHO_DEFEND.title: Defend
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_KAHO_STRIKE.title: Strike
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_WIDE_HEART.title: Wide Heart
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BLOOMING_HEART.title: Blooming Heart
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BLOOMING_HEART.descript: Increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. They each cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less next time they are played.
Set your Max ❤️ to 99, but you can no longer increase Max ❤️. At the end of combat, increase your Max HP by {IfUpgraded:show:twice |}the highest single increase to your Max ❤️.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_LINKURA_ENERGY.title: Linkura Energy
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SPECIAL_THANKS.title: Special Thanks
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_A_THOUSAND_CHANGES.desc: This turn, your ❤️ overflow is converted to an equal amount of Max ❤️.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUMMERY_PAIN.title: Summery Pain
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUMMERY_PAIN.descriptio: Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold] and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Whenever you have fewer than {LINKURA_MOD_HAND_THRESHOLD:diff()} cards in [gold]Hand[/gold], draw cards until you have {LINKURA_MOD_HAND_THRESHOLD:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_PRESENT_PAST_FUTURE.des: Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold] and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Trigger this card's effect for every {LINKURA_MOD_PPF_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} ❤️ you [gold]Collect[/gold]. (Current: {LINKURA_MOD_PPF_TRACKER})
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_IS_THAT_CLOUD_A_WHALE.d: Gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold] for every {LINKURA_MOD_MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} Max ❤️ you have. Reset Max ❤️ to 9.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_EXCESSIVE_TRAINING.desc: Reduce your Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} up to {LINKURA_MOD_MAX_TIMES:diff()} {LINKURA_MOD_MAX_TIMES:plural:time|times}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each reduction.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ENDURING_TRADITION.desc: Until the end of turn, whenever your Max ❤️ increases, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] that many times and [gold]Collect[/gold] instead.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TWO_SECONDS_OF_ETERNITY: Play all other cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. This card's cost equals their total cost.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BALL_OF_TRAILS.title: Ball of Trails
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BALL_OF_TRAILS.descript: [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}. If drawn at the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and discard your [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw that many cards.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SPECIAL_THANKS.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play an Attack, [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUDDING_PREMONITION.des: Increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Deal damage equal to your current Max ❤️ to ALL enemies.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_POCHI.title: Pochi!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_POCHI.description: Deal damage equal to your current ❤️. [gold]Collect[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRAINING_OUTCOMES.title: Training Outcomes
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRAINING_OUTCOMES.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less in this combat.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_KAHO_SMASH.title: Kaho Smash
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FANTASY375.title: 37.5°C's Fantasy
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FANTASY375.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next Power card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_STEP_UP.title: Step Up!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_STEP_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times. Increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUNNY_PYON_PYON.title: Bunny Pyon Pyon
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUNNY_PYON_PYON.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Burst[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CERISE_BOUQUET.title: Cerise Bouquet
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CERISE_BOUQUET.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.des: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever [gold]Burst[/gold] reaches your ❤️ limit, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUNNY_DEFEND.title: Bunny Defend
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUNNY_DEFEND.descriptio: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current Max ❤️.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_GENYOU_YAKOU.title: Genyou Yakou
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_GENYOU_YAKOU.descriptio: If you have 6 or fewer ❤️, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ZANYOU.title: Zanyou
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_NEW_BLACK.title: Nεw Black
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FULL_OF_POWER.title: Full Of Power
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AGILE_STEPS.title: Agile Steps
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AGILE_STEPS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}. Your next Attack card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_LOVE_IT.title: Love it!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MIX_SHAKE.title: Mix shake!!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MIX_SHAKE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Triggers once more for every 6 ❤️ you have.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FAN_SERVICE.title: Fan Service
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FAN_SERVICE.description: [gold]Collect[/gold]. This [gold]Collect[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_GLOWING_ROUTINE.title: Glowing Routine
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_GLOWING_ROUTINE.descrip: At the start of your turn, [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_UNFULFILLED_WISHES.desc: Deal damage equal to the difference between your Max ❤️ and current ❤️. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current ❤️.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_VARIATIONS.title: Variations
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_VARIATIONS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever your Max ❤️ changes, this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less next time it is played.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AFTERGLOW.title: Afterglow
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AFTERGLOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], return this card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUILD_UP.title: Build-up
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BUILD_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {BUILD_UP_DRAW:diff()} {BUILD_UP_DRAW:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: for every 3 times you [gold]Burst[/gold], draw 1 extra card the next time you play this card. (Current: {BUILD_UP_TRACKER})
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.title: Full Bloom Sprint
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If your ❤️ count is less than half your Max ❤️, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.title: Ephemeral Youth
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a card, reduce this card's damage by 4 this turn.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HEART_STRIKE.title: Heart Strike
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HEART_STRIKE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Increase Max ❤️ by unblocked damage dealt.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BACKSTAGE_PREPARATION.d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next [gold]Backstage[/gold] card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_OVERFLOWING_EMOTION.des: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], permanently increase this card's damage by {OVERFLOWING_EMOTION_GROWTH:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SRK.title: S.R.K.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SRK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_EMBRACING_PETALS.title: Embracing Petals
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_EMBRACING_PETALS.descri: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] amount to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], gain {LINKURA_MOD_AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] and discard this card.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SAYO_SHIGURE.title: Sayo-Shigure
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SAYO_SHIGURE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] 9, [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}. (Current: {SAYO_SHIGURE_TRACKER})
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_DREAM_BELIEVERS.title: Dream Believers
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AURORA_FLOWER.title: Aurora Flower
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ON_YOUR_MARK.title: On Your Mark
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ON_YOUR_MARK.descriptio: Increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}X. When drawn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {Block:diff()}x your current Energy.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SOULMATE.title: Soulmate
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MENTAL_GUARD.title: Mental Guard
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MENTAL_GUARD.descriptio: This turn, your [gold]Burst[/gold] no longer grants ❤️, but grants an equal amount of [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.title: Fall Back Asleep
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.descri: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current ❤️. [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the end of this turn.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ENCORE.title: Encore
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_ENCORE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for every [gold]Burst[/gold] triggered this turn. (Current: {ENCORE_TRACKER})
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CELEBRATION.title: Celebration!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.title: True Face Pixel
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.descrip: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. Add them to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.selecti: Choose up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FULL_BLOOM.title: Full Bloom!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FULL_BLOOM.description: If your ❤️ is at max, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Collect[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CHOREOGRAPHY_MEMO.title: Choreography Memo
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CHOREOGRAPHY_MEMO.descr: [gold]Burst[/gold] {LINKURA_MOD_BURST:diff()} a total of {Repeat:diff()} times. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: every {CHOREOGRAPHY_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} times you [gold]Burst[/gold], [gold]Collect[/gold]. (Current: {CHOREOGRAPHY_TRACKER})
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_LINK_TO_THE_FUTURE.desc: Retain your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn. Next turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.title: Suki Suki Club
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.descript: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. When drawn, increase Max ❤️ by {LINKURA_MOD_EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SECTION_CHANGE.title: Section Change
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SECTION_CHANGE.descript: At the end of your turn, [gold]Collect[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUGAR_MELT.title: Sugar Melt
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SUGAR_MELT.description: Gain {LINKURA_MOD_AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold]. Whenever you [gold]Auto Burst[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SPECIAL_APPEAL.title: Special Appeal
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_SPECIAL_APPEAL.descript: Your [gold]Collect[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_UNADORNED_BEAUTY.title: Unadorned Beauty
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_UNADORNED_BEAUTY.descri: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. You can no longer increase your ❤️ limit.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AUTO_COLLECT_ON.title: Auto Collect: On
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY.title: Holiday∞Holiday
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.title: Welcome! Ishikawa
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.descri: At the start of your turn, choose at most {Cards:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRAINING_CAMP.title: Training Camp
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_TRAINING_CAMP.descripti: The first {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] cards you play each turn cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CAREER_SURVEY.title: Career Survey
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_CAREER_SURVEY.descripti: At the start of your turn, convert ❤️ to equal [gold]Block[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AUTO_CLICKER_ON.title: Auto Clicker: On
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_AUTO_CLICKER_ON.descrip: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold], [gold]Collect[/gold]. ALL enemies and newly appearing enemies gain 99 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FLOWER_KNOT.title: Flower Knot
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_FLOWER_KNOT.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, discard that [gold]Backstage[/gold] card and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_REFLECTION_IN_THE_MIRRO: Effects that increase your Max ❤️ trigger twice.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_PROLOGUE.title: Prologue
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_PROLOGUE.description: Whenever your Max ❤️ changes, your next card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less this turn.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.title: May Dreams Bloom
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.descri: For every {LINKURA_MOD_MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} ❤️ overflowed, gain 1 stack of [gold]Auto Burst[/gold]. Does not count overflow from [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_BLOOM_GARDEN_PARTY.desc: Your [gold]Backstage[/gold] effects can also trigger from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HAPPY_SUPREMACY.title: Happy Supremacy!
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HAPPY_SUPREMACY.descrip: Convert all your ❤️ to [gold]Strength[/gold] or [gold]Dexterity[/gold], randomly distributed to ALL {IfUpgraded:show:players|players and enemies}.
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HINOSHITA_INSTALL.title: Hinoshita Install
LINKURA_MOD_CARD_HINOSHITA_INSTALL.descr: When another player plays a card, it also triggers your [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
